demo.default_notice: Demo mode is active: actions update the interface but do not persist to the DB.
demo.llm_disabled: Demo mode: real LLM API queries are disabled.
demo.tts_disabled: Demo mode: real TTS queries are disabled.
demo.stt_disabled: Demo mode: real STT queries are disabled.

login.title: Sales Alerts Dashboard
login.description: Access for Sales Delegates. Review churn signals, purchase propensity and operational recommendations in a view ready for backend integration.
login.mock_login: Demo login. No real authentication is required.
login.error_required: Enter email and password to log in.

role_selector.label: Access profile
role_selector.regional_desc: Aggregated view by area, Managers and Agents.

hero.title: KeepInibsa
hero.description: A standalone app that turns dental clinic purchase patterns into actionable Alerts for Delegates and Managers.

snapshot.title: Commercial signal in production shape
snapshot.description: The Dashboard shows Alerts generated from real data provided by INIBSA to train and run inference with our models.

data.title: INIBSA data
data.description: The challenge dataset was proposed and provided by INIBSA, with commercial history used for training, inference and explainability.

pipeline.title: Actionable pipeline
pipeline.description: The models produce priorities, explanations and activation routes for a Delegate, Manager or future automation layer.

problem.title: Detect purchase need before demand is lost
problem.description: Dental clinics combine recurring commodity purchases with technical products that behave irregularly. The solution estimates expected demand, identifies capture windows and separates normal variation from real churn signals.

models.title: Three predictive models built for action

repurchase.title: Classic Neural Network
repurchase.description: Feed-forward classifier that predicts whether a client will repurchase a product family.

days.title: Sequential Model · next purchase
days.description: GRU sequence model that anticipates days until the next expected purchase and prioritizes contact timing.

potential.title: Sequential Model · potential
potential.description: GRU sequence model that estimates the commercial potential class and helps prioritize Alerts.

erik.description: Architected the foundational full-stack app with FastAPI/React, DevOps infrastructure, DB pipelines and Gemini LLM integrations.

ernest.description: Led VPS deployment, bilingual frontend features, ElevenLabs voice cloning and agent-scoped notifications.

alvaro.description: Designed and trained the B2B neural networks, ingestion, inference, explainability and actionable Alert routing.

footer.event: Project created for InterHack-2026 with INIBSA's Smart Demand Signals challenge.

dashboard.title: Commercial Alerts Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Operational view to detect churn risk, purchase opportunity and next actions for prioritized clients.
dashboard.mock_data: Demo data · Ready for backend integration

table.title: Commercial Alerts
table.description: Prioritize clients with churn signals, purchase opportunity and commercial value.

ai.title: Ask AI
ai.description: Your intelligent sales assistant. Ask anything you need about this client.
ai.error: I could not get a response. Please try again.

demo_response.intro: For the question "{{question}}", the demo reading for {{client}} is the following.
demo_response.signal: The incidence combines {{risk}} risk, {{churn}}% churn potential, {{propensity}}% purchase propensity, {{value}} value and {{churnType}} type.
demo_response.next_purchase: The estimated next purchase is {{date}}, so the best use of the Alert is to review timing, affected family and commercial priority.
demo_response.action: With no visible estimated date, the demo recommendation is to review the affected family, validate the historical pattern and register the management outcome.
demo_response.disclaimer: Demo mode: real LLM API queries are disabled.

form.title: Register management
form.description: Update {{name}} status and leave a signal for internal follow-up.
form.reminder_placeholder: Any relevant observation about this client management...

dismiss.title: Dismiss this Alert?
dismiss.description: The Alert will move to the dismissed tab.

regional_dashboard.title: Regional Management Dashboard
regional_dashboard.subtitle: Executive control of Alerts by region, Managers, Agents and clients.

map.title: Regional Map
map.subtitle: Select an area to view operational detail.
map.aria: Interactive Spain map by commercial areas
